ddls:
CREATE TABLE "descriptors" (
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptor */,
  "descriptor_name" TEXT /* Name of the descriptor */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the descriptor (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  "descriptor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the descriptor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the descriptor was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the descriptor is active */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the descriptor */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Formula of the molecule associated with the descriptor */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Weight of the molecule associated with the descriptor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptors_descriptor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor_type_id") REFERENCES descriptor_types ("descriptor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "descriptor_types" (
  "descriptor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each descriptor type */,
  "descriptor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the descriptor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the descriptor type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the descriptor type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the descriptor type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the descriptor type is active */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the descriptor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("descriptor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptor_types_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "descriptor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the descriptor the reference is associated with */,
  "reference_text" TEXT /* Text of the reference */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the reference was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the reference is active */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the reference */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the reference */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the reference was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the reference in the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_descriptor_id FOREIGN KEY ("descriptor_id") REFERENCES descriptors ("descriptor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
